mapper.select: SELECT user_id, total_diary_count, current_streak_days, last_diary_date, generated_at, dirty FROM tb_diary_summary_cache WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_id, period_type, period_key, tag, tag_count, rank_no, generated_at FROM tb_diary_tag_summary_cache WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN period_type = 'ALL' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, period_key DESC, rank_no ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_diary d WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND d.is_deleted = 0
SELECT MAX(d.diary_date) FROM tb_diary d WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND d.is_deleted = 0

SELECT t.tag_name AS tag, COUNT(*) AS tag_count FROM tb_diary d INNER JOIN tb_diary_tag dt ON dt.diary_id = d.diary_id INNER JOIN tb_tag t ON t.tag_id = dt.tag_id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.tag_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, t.tag_name ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ranked.diary_year AS year, ranked.tag AS tag, ranked.tag_count AS tag_count FROM ( SELECT YEAR(d.diary_date) AS diary_year, t.tag_name AS tag, COUNT(*) AS tag_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY YEAR(d.diary_date) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, t.tag_name ASC ) AS rn FROM tb_diary d INNER JOIN tb_diary_tag dt ON dt.diary_id = d.diary_id INNER JOIN tb_tag t ON t.tag_id = dt.tag_id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY YEAR(d.diary_date), t.tag_name ) ranked WHERE ranked.rn <= #{limit} ORDER BY ranked.diary_year DESC, ranked.rn ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_diary_summary_cache ( user_id, total_diary_count, current_streak_days, last_diary_date, generated_at, dirty ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{totalDiaryCount}, #{currentStreakDays}, #{lastDiaryDate}, NOW(), 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_diary_count = VALUES(total_diary_count), current_streak_days = VALUES(current_streak_days), last_diary_date = VALUES(last_diary_date), generated_at = NOW(), dirty = 0

INSERT INTO tb_diary_tag_summary_cache ( user_id, period_type, period_key, tag, tag_count, rank_no, generated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.periodType}, #{item.periodKey}, #{item.tag}, #{item.tagCount}, #{item.rankNo}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO tb_diary_summary_cache ( user_id, total_diary_count, current_streak_days, last_diary_date, generated_at, dirty ) VALUES (#{userId}, 0, 0, NULL, NOW(), 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE dirty = 1
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM tb_diary_summary_cache WHERE dirty = 1 ORDER BY user_id
